# Ghost Access Daily Health Summary Template

## Status

Use this once per pilot day. Keep it short enough to send to a buyer or paste
into the pilot tracker. Do not include raw subscription URLs, UUIDs, tokens,
private keys, QR codes, IP addresses tied to a named person, or screenshots with
credentials.

## Header

- Pilot ID:
- Date:
- Day: `1` / `2` / `3` / `4` / `5` / `6` / `7`
- Overall status: `green` / `yellow` / `red`
- Access path nickname:

## Buyer-Visible Summary

```text
Status: green/yellow/red.
What we saw:
What changed:
What we are watching next:
```

## Checks

| Check | Result | Evidence | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| User-visible symptom | `ok/degraded/failing/unknown` | | |
| Subscription or access lifecycle | `ok/degraded/failing/unknown` | redacted path/hash only | |
| Server/listener/process health | `ok/degraded/failing/unknown` | redacted path/hash only | |
| Client compatibility | `ok/degraded/failing/unknown` | redacted path/hash only | |
| Incident timeline updated | `yes/no` | | |

## Incidents

- New incidents today:
- Open incidents:
- Resolved or explained incidents:

## Actions

- Action taken:
- Action intentionally not taken:
- Reason risky action was avoided:

## Next Check

- Next check time:
- Next safe diagnostic:
- Buyer question, if any:

## Privacy Confirmation

- Raw subscription URLs collected: `no`
- UUIDs recorded: `no`
- Tokens or private keys collected: `no`
- Screenshots with credentials retained: `no`
